top_signals.title: Jamie Dimon on Bond Market, Inflation and Equities
top_signals.summary: CEO of JPMorgan Chase Jamie Dimon speaks exclusively with Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin about the rout in bond markets, the risk of heightened inflation, and why corporate earnings remain so high. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
